creator: c47g@gmx.at
text:
Hi!

As far as I can tell the patch looks reasonable to me. You can close 
ports/181839 then, too.

Many thanks,
Christian.

On 11.10.2013 09:30, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of graphics/inventor,
>
> Please note that PR ports/182900 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/182900
